overall.description: First-person underwater exploration gameplay from Subnautica, featuring a player swimming through bioluminescent caves, ascending through open water, and encountering a massive sea creature near the surface. The environment transitions from dark enclosed spaces to bright open ocean.

agents.ego_description: swimming slowly through a narrow cave corridor lined with glowing mushrooms and rocky walls

entered.detail: large red-capped mushrooms with glowing teal spots lining the cave walls
dark rocky cave walls enclosing the swimming corridor
white bioluminescent particles floating in the water

segments.scene_description: Swimming through a narrow underwater cave illuminated by bioluminescent mushrooms and floating particles, with rocky walls enclosing the space on both sides.

events.description: exits the enclosed mushroom cave into open underwater space

agents.ego_description: ascending toward the surface while leaving the cave system behind, swimming through darker open water

entered.detail: dark open water column replacing the enclosed cave walls
tall rock formations rising from the seabed

segments.scene_description: Leaving the mushroom cave behind and entering the open water column, beginning the ascent toward the surface through darker waters with occasional rock pillars.

events.description: water color shifts from dark blue to green as natural light from surface increases

agents.ego_description: continuing to swim upward through increasingly bright green water toward the surface

entered.detail: bright daylight filtering down from the water surface above
underwater rock formations visible on the seabed below

segments.scene_description: Ascending through the open water column as the environment brightens and turns green, with the surface visible as a bright area above and rocky formations below.

scene_state.functional_zone: surface encounter area with large creature

events.description: massive sea creature with glowing green eyes comes into view near the surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the surface and observing the large sea creature swimming nearby while navigating around floating rocks

notable_agents.action: massive sea creature swimming slowly near the surface with glowing green eyes and long tentacles

entered.detail: massive alien sea creature with tentacles and glowing green eyes swimming near the surface
rocks suspended in water covered with pink bioluminescent organisms
rippling water surface visible from below with light patterns

segments.scene_description: Approaching the water surface where a massive sea creature swims among floating rocks covered in pink bioluminescent organisms, with bright daylight filtering through the rippling surface above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater ascent that transforms from a claustrophobic bioluminescent cavern into a bright, open ocean surface. It begins by gliding through a narrow cave where glowing mushrooms and floating particles illuminate the enclosing rocky walls. As the camera leaves the cavern behind, the space opens into a dark water column where the view expands past occasional rock pillars during a steady climb. The environment then brightens, shifting from deep shadows to a vibrant green as the surface becomes visible above and rocky formations recede below. Finally, the camera reaches the rippling surface where bright daylight filters down upon a massive sea creature swimming among floating rocks adorned with pink bioluminescent organisms.
